mapper.select: SELECT 'GOODS' AS type, o.id AS biz_id, g.title AS title, c.other_user_id, ou.nickname AS other_nickname, ou.avatar_url AS other_avatar_url, lm.content AS last_content, lm.create_time AS last_time, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_goods_message um WHERE um.order_id = c.order_id AND um.receiver_id = #{userId} AND um.sender_id = c.other_user_id AND um.read_flag = 0 ) AS unread_count FROM ( SELECT m.order_id, CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END AS other_user_id, MAX(m.id) AS last_id FROM t_goods_message m WHERE m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY m.order_id, other_user_id ) c JOIN t_goods_order o ON o.id = c.order_id JOIN t_goods g ON g.id = o.goods_id JOIN t_user ou ON ou.id = c.other_user_id JOIN t_goods_message lm ON lm.id = c.last_id ORDER BY g.title ASC, lm.id DESC

SELECT 'GOODS' AS type, order_id AS biz_id, id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, read_flag, create_time FROM t_goods_message WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND ( (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{otherUserId}) OR (sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_goods_message (order_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, read_flag, create_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_goods_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_goods_message WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND ( (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{otherUserId}) OR (sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) )
